name: Persephone (Stray Gods)
description: Persephone was once just another member of the Chorus, the group watching over the rest of the idols, set after the events of Calliope's death and Athena's deposition, Persephone goes on to run her Club which she'd named 'Elysium' a rebranding of the original name of the club.
creator: QueensWrath12
